zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Bridport於大約1335年出生在英國薩默塞特特拉金頓時，她的父親John de Bridport42歲，母親Joan Mountsorrell26歲。她於1355年與John De Beauchamp在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1385年3月15日在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Bridport于大约1335年出生在英国薩默塞特特拉金頓时，她的父亲John de Bridport42岁，母亲Joan Mountsorrell26岁。她于1355年与John De Beauchamp在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1385年3月15日在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Bridport was born about 1335, in Whitelackington, Somerset, England, her father, John de Bridport, was 42 and her mother, Joan Mountsorrell, was 26. She married John De Beauchamp in 1355, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 15 March 1385, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Bridport est née environ 1335, à Whitelackington, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John de Bridport, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Joan Mountsorrell, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John De Beauchamp en 1355, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 mars 1385, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Bridport um 1335 in Whitelackington, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Bridport 42 und ihre Mutter Joan Mountsorrell 26. Sie hat 1355 in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom John De Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. März 1385 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bridport è nata il circa 1335 nel Whitelackington, Somerset, England, sua padre, John de Bridport, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Joan Mountsorrell, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John De Beauchamp nel 1355, nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 15 marzo 1385, nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bridportが約1335年にイギリスソメルセトウィテラクイントンで生まれた時，父John de Bridportは42歳，母Joan Mountsorrellは26歳であった。1355年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンでJohn De Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1385年3月15日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bridport(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 서머세트 휘텔악킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Bridport(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Mountsorrell(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 John De Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 3월 15일 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bridport nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Whitelackington, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Bridport, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Joan Mountsorrell, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John De Beauchamp em 1355, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de março de 1385, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Bridport родилась около 1335 г. в местности уителаккингтон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Bridport было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Mountsorrell, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John De Beauchamp в 1355 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 15 марта 1385 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Bridport nació aproximadamente 1335, en Whitelackington, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Bridport, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Joan Mountsorrell, tenía 26 años. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1385, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
